Eurogame
triples.object: A Eurogame , also called a German-style board game , German game , or Euro-style game (generally only referred to as board games in Europe), is a class of tabletop games which generally feature indirect player interaction and lack of player elimination, while providing multiple ways to score points

Deck-building game
triples.object: A deck-building game is a card game or board game where construction of a deck of cards is a main element of gameplay . [ 1 ] Deck-building games are similar to collectible card games (CCGs) in that each player has their own deck. However, unlike CCGs, the cards are not sold in randomized packs, and

triples.subject: Cooperative board game
triples.object: Cooperative board games are board games in which players work together to achieve a common goal rather than competing against each other. [ 1 ] Either the players win the game by reaching a predetermined objective, or all players lose the game, often by not reaching the objective before a certain ev

triples.subject: BoardGameGeek
triples.object: BoardGameGeek ( BGG ) is an online forum for board gaming hobbyists and a user-generated game database that holds reviews, images and videos for over 150,000 different tabletop games . The site allows users to rate games on a 1â10 scale and shows these as a ranked list of board games. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

Asmodee Editions
triples.object: Asmodee (formerly known as AsmodÃ©e Editions ) is a French publisher of board games , card games and role-playing games (RPGs). Founded in 1995 to develop their own games and to publish and distribute for other smaller game developers, they have since acquired numerous other board game publishers. A

triples.subject: CMON Limited
triples.object: CMON Limited , formerly known as CoolMiniOrNot is a publicly listed miniatures and board game publisher, trading on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. It also operates a miniatures related site coolminiornot.com [ 2 ] that features user submitted images of their painted models for voting.
